menuDashboard.title: Start with your dashboard
menuDashboard.description: This is your main overview: progress, quick actions, and the natural starting point every time you enter the app.

menuAssistant.title: Your AI assistant in one click
menuAssistant.description: Use this option to open smart guidance for questions, study direction, and faster progress without breaking your flow.

menuTest.title: Your test practice area
menuTest.description: This section takes you to the test flow to train with questions, measure your level, and reinforce weak spots quickly.

menuSyllabus.title: All your syllabus in one place
menuSyllabus.description: Here you review study content, move through topics, and return to the material whenever you need more depth.

menuStudy.title: Pomodoro to enter focus mode
menuStudy.description: Use this entry point to open your study area, work in sessions, and keep a steady concentration rhythm.
